examples: The couple are said to be fabulously wealthy.
It is a misconception that Peggy was fabulously wealthy.
Mr Buffett is a modest, laid-back and fabulously wealthy guy.
Four hundred years ago, a fabulously wealthy arms dealer and moneylender named Thomas Sutton was approaching death.
Above ground, the fabulously funky Q Brothers will perform their hip hop-rap act Othello: The Remix.
